sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97443" key="stwi+keu/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στωϊκ-εύομαι</orth>, <sense id="n97443.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">play the Stoic</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πρός τινα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Numen.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2018.tlg001:14:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eus.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PE</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
